message.content:
@startuml
title PCWS Sequences
actor Customer
participant "PCWS" as PCWS
database "PostgreSQL" as PostgreSQL
participant "Disk" as Disk
participant "transfer_logs.sh" as transfer_logs
participant "Account Service" as AccountService
participant "Datalog Service" as DatalogService

Customer -> PCWS: request image
PCWS -> AccountService: check account permission
PCWS -> PCWS: generate image
PCWS -> Disk: write data log
PCWS --> Customer: image

note over Disk, DatalogService: some time later

loop for each log
    transfer_logs <- Disk: read data log
    transfer_logs -> DatalogService: send data log
    DatalogService --> transfer_logs
end

@enduml
